prompt: Using this grayscale depth map reference, generate a photorealistic computer graphics rendering. Create a detailed still life scene translating the spatial distances and 3D structure defined by the depth map into a vivid color image.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic computer graphics rendering of a detailed still life scene. Use image 1 as a grayscale depth map reference to precisely translate the spatial distances and 3D structure into a vivid color image. The scene should feature a central bottle, a human skull positioned to its right and slightly behind, and various fruits including a partially eaten apple, an avocado, and grapes, all arranged on a surface in the foreground.
objects: human skull (positioned to its right and slightly behind the bottle)
